scripts.dev: cross-env TARGET_ENV=desktop NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k --prefix none "rspeedy dev --environment lynx" "dev-ready-rspeedy && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx rspack dev"
scripts.build: rspeedy build --environment lynx && cross-env TARGET_ENV=desktop NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx rspack build
scripts.dev:web: cross-env TARGET_ENV=web NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k --prefix node "rspeedy dev --environment web" "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx rspack serve"
scripts.build:web: rspeedy build --environment web && cross-env TARGET_ENV=web NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx rspack build
scripts.start:web: npm run build:web && npx serve dist/web
